name: Tortellini and Artichoke Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop and drain the marinated artichoke hearts, reserving the liquid.
2. Cook the tortellini; rinse and drain well.
3. Toss the cooked tortellini with the chopped marinated artichoke hearts and peppers.
4. Combine the remaining ingredients, including the reserved artichoke liquid, and toss with the tortellini.
